description: Instructional text appears on screen: 'Great. To start, please click the "Share" button'
Task scenario text appears: 'Imagine you're living on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland and you're planning a holiday to London.'
Detailed task instructions are revealed, explaining the planning process and evaluation criteria.
Final instructions are displayed and an 'Open' button appears at the top of the screen to begin the task.
User hovers over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button on the dark instruction screen.

description: User navigates from the task instructions to the Google homepage
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dark instruction text to the Google search homepage.

description: User types 'sky' into the Google search bar, triggering search suggestions
frame_description: The text 'sky' appears in the search input field and a dropdown of suggestions including 'skyscanner' is displayed.

description: User navigates to the Skyscanner search results page
frame_description: The page loads the Skyscanner website after the user selects a search result or suggestion.

description: User is reading the task instructions regarding a holiday to London.
frame_description: A dark screen displaying text instructions for the user to read before starting the task.

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 9.5, uniformity: 0.76)

description: Scroll E (magnitude: 21.1, uniformity: 0.62)

description: User dwells on the 'Think Aloud Reminder' screen, likely reading the prompt or instructions.

description: User continues typing in the destination search field, changing the input from 'lon' to 'lond'.

description: The page navigates from the search input screen to a loading state for the flight search results.
page_title: Skyscanner - Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.

description: The flight search results page loads incrementally, transitioning from a skeleton screen to displaying flight options and filters.
page_title: Skyscanner - Millions of cheap flights. One simple search.
frame_description: The UI updates as flight data and filter options (like 'Stops' and 'Departure times') become visible on the results page.

description: Flight search results finished loading, transitioning from 'Checked 25 of 26 providers' to '997 results sorted by Best'.
frame_description: The loading spinner and provider count are replaced by the final number of flight results.

description: User is reviewing the flight search results, specifically examining the details for the Emirates + Qantas and Qatar Airways flight options.
frame_description: The screen shows detailed flight information including airline names (Emirates, Qantas, Qatar Airways), departure/arrival times, and stopover details.

description: The flight search results page updates to a 'no flights found' state, displaying London hotel deals instead, likely following a user interaction or filter application.
frame_description: The screen transitions from showing specific flight options (Virgin Australia, Qantas) to a message stating no flights match the filters, followed by a list of London hotel deals.

description: User hovered over the date navigation bar for Sunday, 26 July.
